name: Default Agent — Starter Order
description: Default starter order for a generic agent persona. Eight standard contexts (greeting, acknowledgement, tool_invocation, progress, completion, error_recovery, clarification, farewell), shared {ack} pool, mix of multi-slot and slot-less templates. 58 atoms — well within the 100-atom cap. Copy and edit pools to match a specific persona.

trigger_hints: First time the user opens the chat
User has given an instruction; persona is about to act
Filler before tool invocation or LLM round-trip
Persona is about to call a registered tool
Replace the {tool} pool with the agent's actual tool registry
Long-running operation; persona checks in to keep user engaged
templates: This is taking a bit longer than expected.

trigger_hints: Persona has finished its task and is handing the result back
A tool call failed or returned unexpected data; persona is going to retry
templates: Something went wrong — let me try {retry_phrase}.

trigger_hints: Persona needs more information before continuing
templates: Could you tell me more about {clarify_target}?

trigger_hints: End of conversation; user is leaving
